changes.value:
Migrate TagPill from hardcoded native context menu to CommandScope pattern.

TagPill wraps in CommandScopeProvider with:
- `entity.inspect` → inspectEntity(moniker("tag", tag.id))
- `entity.remove` → rustCommand: { cmd: "task.untag", args: { id: parentTaskId, tag: slug } }

TagPill needs access to the parent task moniker. It already receives `taskId` as a prop — use that.

Wire `onContextMenu={useContextMenu()}` on the pill span.

Remove:
- The hardcoded `invoke("show_tag_context_menu")` call
- The `tag-context-menu` event listener in App.tsx
- The `show_tag_context_menu` Rust command
- The `context_tag` state in AppState

- [ ] Wrap TagPill in CommandScopeProvider with entity.inspect and entity.remove
- [ ] Wire onContextMenu on pill span
- [ ] Remove hardcoded invoke("show_tag_context_menu") from TagPill
- [ ] Remove tag-context-menu listener from App.tsx
- [ ] Remove show_tag_context_menu from commands.rs
- [ ] Remove context_tag from AppState
- [ ] Update tests
- [ ] Run tests
Frontend: TagPill CommandScope + context menu migration

--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Migrate TagPill from hardcoded native context menu to CommandScope pattern.

TagPill wraps in CommandScopeProvider with:
- `entity.inspect` → inspectEntity(moniker("tag", tag.id))
- `entity.remove` → rustCommand: { cmd: "task.untag", args: { id: parentTaskId, tag: slug } }

TagPill needs access to the parent task moniker. It already receives `taskId` as a prop — use that.

Wire `onContextMenu={useContextMenu()}` on the pill span.

- The `tag-context-menu` event listener in App.tsx
- The `show_tag_context_menu` Rust command
- The `context_tag` state in AppState

- [ ] Wrap TagPill in CommandScopeProvider with entity.inspect and entity.remove
- [ ] Wire onContextMenu on pill span
- [ ] Remove hardcoded invoke("show_tag_context_menu") from TagPill
- [ ] Remove tag-context-menu listener from App.tsx
- [ ] Remove show_tag_context_menu from commands.rs
- [ ] Remove context_tag from AppState
- [ ] Update tests
- [ ] Run tests
\ No newline at end of file
+Migrate TagPill from hardcoded native context menu to CommandScope pattern.

TagPill wraps in CommandScopeProvider with:
- `entity.inspect` → inspectEntity(moniker("tag", tag.id)) — contextMenu: true
- `entity.remove` → rustCommand: { cmd: "task.untag", args: { id: parentTaskId, tag: slug } } — contextMenu: true

TagPill needs access to the parent task moniker. It already receives `taskId` as a prop — use that.

Wire `onContextMenu={useContextMenu()}` on the pill span.

Remove:
- The hardcoded `invoke("show_tag_context_menu")` call
- The `tag-context-menu` event listener in App.tsx

- [ ] Wrap TagPill in CommandScopeProvider with entity.inspect and entity.remove
- [ ] Wire onContextMenu on pill span
- [ ] Remove hardcoded invoke("show_tag_context_menu") from TagPill
- [ ] Remove tag-context-menu listener from App.tsx
- [ ] entity.remove only available when taskId prop is set (tag pill outside a card has no parent to remove from)

Tests (tag-pill.test.tsx — new or extend existing):
- [ ] `right-click shows context menu with entity.inspect and entity.remove` — mock invoke, fire contextmenu, verify items array
- [ ] `entity.inspect uses tag moniker` — verify moniker is "tag:<resolved-tag-id>", not the slug
- [ ] `entity.remove has correct rustCommand args` — verify { cmd: "task.untag", args: { id: taskId, tag: slug } }
- [ ] `entity.remove not available when taskId is undefined` — render without taskId, right-click only shows inspect
- [ ] `context menu stops propagation` — right-click tag doesn't bubble to card's context menu
- [ ] `tag without matching entity still shows context menu` — unknown slug, inspect may be unavailable but no crash
- [ ] `old show_tag_context_menu invoke is gone` — grep test: no references to show_tag_context_menu in tag-pill.tsx

Tests (App.test.tsx — update):
- [ ] `tag-context-menu listener removed` — verify no listen("tag-context-menu") in App component
\ No newline at end of file
